playbook.intent: Candidate take-home / live coding → apples-to-apples rubric score (lint + sec + tests floor identical to team standard).
playbook.scope: A candidate submits a take-home or completes a live coding loop. Reviewer scores against a fixed structured-interview rubric. AI bot runs the candidate's code through the same lint / security / test floors the team uses on its own PRs to make signal apples-to-apples. Bias check is run on rubric scoring before any decision is committed.

success-criteria.criterion: Candidate code run through identical CI floor as internal PRs
Hire / no-hire / next-round decision with reasoning

stage.name: Run candidate code through team floor
stage.intent: AI bot lints + scans + runs tests at the same bar as team PRs.

tasks.task: Run CodeQL autofix on the submission
Capture findings count, not personality judgements

stage.decision-gate: Advance to human review only after the floor has run. Don't read whitespace.

stage.name: Structured interview + rubric scoring
stage.intent: Score with a structured interview rubric; capture STAR evidence.

tasks.task: Use STAR-method on the take-home / live session

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every rubric line has an evidence quote. Vibes-only entries get rewritten.

stage.name: Bias check + decision
stage.intent: Bias-check the scoring before committing the verdict.

tasks.task: Compare scoring vs identical-bar internal PR results
Flag any scoring delta that correlates with name / accent / school
Commit hire / no-hire / next-round decision with reasoning

stage.decision-gate: Required: written decision + bias check. Skipping bias check defaults to status-quo team shape.

extra.value: [Sourcing + posting — separate funnel, Offer + negotiation — out of scope, Onboarding — see hire-onboard-product-dev-2-weeks]
[Structured interview rubric agreed by team, Lint / sec / test floor identical to team standard, Bias-check protocol in place]

[Reading the submission before the AI floor has run — surfaces personal preferences before objective signal, Rubric scoring without evidence quotes — bias creeps in, Skipping bias check on 'obvious' decisions — these are the riskiest, Different bar for candidates vs internal PRs — invalidates the comparison]
['Did the floor run identically to a team PR?', 'Can each rubric score be traced to a quote / artifact?', 'Did the bias check actually look for patterns, not check a box?']

{human: faion get-content hiring-screen-take-home-review --format md, agent: faion get-content hiring-screen-take-home-review --format context, json: faion get-content hiring-screen-take-home-review --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
